prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023年最低位次约2455名，2024年降至约2825名（后移约370名），2025年回升至约2378名（前移约447名），近三年波动较大，2025年基准约2378名；该校在新疆理科招生计划2023年45人、2024年45人、2025年38人，2026年计划40人，较2025年小幅扩招约5.3%，扩招对竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211 、双一流；软科主榜排名持续上升，2021年第30名→2026年第24名，学校综合实力和认可度稳步提升；2024年声誉评价为"明显负面"，主要因招生沟通不畅、专 业设置不合理导致投档线暴跌约500名；但抖音热度排名第13（高热），以食堂特色和张雪峰推荐获得较高关注，整体报考关注度不低；拥有7个A-及以上学科， 其中作物学、兽医学、畜牧学、草学、食品科学与工程为A+，生物学、植物保护为A，学科实力顶尖，对农林类考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/ 通信、电气工程等社会热门专业热度持续偏高；农林类相关专业（生化环材）社会热度偏低，但中国农业大学作为顶尖农林院校，其王牌专业仍具独特吸引力。本省2026年考生总 数约23.8万人，较2025年约7.65万人大幅增加，竞争显著加剧，较2024年390分上升，反映整体竞争强度提升。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基 准位次2378名、2026年小幅扩招约5.3%、学校排名持续上升、本省考生总数大幅增加等因素，扩招缓解效应被考生激增的竞争压力所抵消，学校排名上升和抖音高热关注度对报考 热度有正面拉动。预计2026年最低位次约2423名，区间2060-2786名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2023 was approximately 2455, dropping to about 2825 in 2024 (a backward shift of about 370 places), then rising to about 2378 in 2025 (a forward shift of about 447 places). The rankings have fluctuated significantly over the past three years, with a baseline of about 2378 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for science in Xinjiang was 45 in 2023, 45 in 2024, 38 in 2025, and 40 in 2026, a slight expansion of about 5.3% compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has been steadily rising, from 30th in 2021 to 24th in 2026, indicating a steady improvement in comprehensive strength and recognition. In 2024, the reputation evaluation was 'clearly negative', mainly due to poor admissions communication and unreasonable major settings, causing the admission score line to plummet by about 500 places. However, it ranks 13th in Douyin popularity (high heat), gaining significant attention due to cafeteria features and Zhang Xuefeng's recommendations, resulting in overall high application attention. It has 7 disciplines rated A- or above, including A+ in Crop Science, Veterinary Medicine, Animal Science, Grassland Science, and Food Science and Engineering, and A in Biology and Plant Protection, showcasing top-tier disciplinary strength, which strongly attracts agriculture and forestry candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Socially popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communications, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high heat. Agriculture and forestry-related majors (Biology, Chemistry, Environment, Materials) have low social heat, but as a top agriculture and forestry university, China Agricultural University's flagship majors still hold unique appeal. The total number of candidates in the province in 2026 is about 238,000, a significant increase from about 76,500 in 2025, intensifying competition. Compared to 2024, the score line of 390 points has risen, reflecting an overall increase in competition intensity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2378, a slight enrollment expansion of about 5.3% in 2026, the university's continuously rising ranking, and a substantial increase in the total number of candidates in the province, the easing effect of expansion is offset by the competitive pressure from the surge in candidates. The rising university ranking and high Douyin attention positively drive application heat. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will be about 2423, with a range of 2060-2786.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 2060-2786, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 flagship experimental classes as a stretch goal, and use Tier 3 advantageous agriculture and forestry disciplines as a safety net. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 2060), prioritize Tier 1 majors such as Science Experimental Class. If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 2786), it is advisable to choose Tier 3 majors like Veterinary Medicine Class and Animal Science, which are A+ disciplines, offering excellent value.
